title: geranium costaricense
intro: Geranium costaricense, also known as the "Costa Rican Geranium," is a species of flowering plant in the geranium family native to Central America. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Geranium costaricense include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-aging properties. Herbal preparations of Geranium costaricense include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
